name: dementia_prediction_tool
description: Predict dementia likelihood from longitudinal clinical notes using a fine-tuned Qwen2 (Dementia-R1) model. Connects to a remote GPU server for inference.

runtime.notes: Runs on CPU locally — sends requests to a remote GPU server for model inference via the DEMENTIA_API_URL environment variable (default http://127.0.0.1:8020).

help.summary: Predict dementia likelihood from uploaded clinical notes using the Dementia-R1 model.
notes: Requires a running Dementia-R1 inference API reachable at DEMENTIA_API_URL (default http://127.0.0.1:8020). Use an SSH tunnel if the GPU server is remote.
Upload a .txt or .md clinical note first, then run @dementia_prediction in Chat.
